name: Two-Phase Commit
generated_spec:
---- MODULE TwoPhaseCommit ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES participants, votes, decision, messages, state
CONSTANTS N, participants

(* Helper definitions *)
MessageType == {"Prepare", "VoteYes", "VoteNo", "Commit", "Abort"}

SendMessage == [sender \in participants \cup {"coordinator"}; receiver \in participants \cup {"coordinator"}; type \in MessageType; content \in {"", "yes", "no"} |-> [sender |-> sender; receiver |-> receiver; type |-> type; content |-> content]

(* Initial state *)
Init == /\ participants = {1, 2, ..., N}
      /\ votes = [p \in participants |-> "none"]
      /\ decision = "none"
      /\ messages = {}
      /\ state = [p \in participants |-> "init"]

(* Next-state relation *)
Next ==
  \/ /\ messages = {}
      /\ decision = "none"
      /\ \E p \in participants : /\ state[p] = "init"
          /\ messages' = messages \cup {SendMessage["coordinator", p, "Prepare", ""]} /\ state' = state
      \/ /\ \E p \in participants : /\ state[p] = "init"
          /\ messages' = messages \cup {SendMessage[p, "coordinator", "VoteYes", "yes"]} /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![p] = "prepared"]
      \/ /\ \E p \in participants : /\ state[p] = "init"
          /\ messages' = messages \cup {SendMessage[p, "coordinator", "VoteNo", "no"]} /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![p] = "prepared"]
      \/ /\ decision = "none"

name: Dining Philosophers
generated_spec:
---- MODULE DiningPhilosophers ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS N
ASSUME N \in Nat /\ N > 0

VARIABLES forks, states

(* Forks: a sequence of length N where each element is either 0 (free) or 1 (held) *)
(* States: a sequence of length N where each element is one of {"thinking", "hungry", "eating"} *)

TypeOK == 
  /\ forks \in Seq(N) /\ Len(forks) = N
  /\ \A i \in 1..N : forks[i] \in {0,1}
  /\ states \in Seq(N) /\ Len(states) = N
  /\ \A i \in 1..N : states[i] \in {"thinking", "hungry", "eating"}

Init == 
  /\ forks = [i \in 1..N |-> 0]
  /\ states = [i \in 1..N |-> "thinking"]

Next == 
  (* A philosopher can become hungry if they are thinking *)
  \/ \A i \in 1..N : 
       /\ states[i] = "thinking"
       /\ states' = [states EXCEPT ![i] = "hungry"]
       /\ forks' = forks
  (* A philosopher can start eating if they are hungry and both adjacent forks are free *)
  \/ \A i \in 1..N : 
       /\ states[i] = "hungry"
       /\ forks[i] = 0
       /\ forks[%(i,N)+1] = 0
       /\ states' = [states EXCEPT ![i] = "eating"]
       /\ forks' = [forks EXCEPT ![i] = 1, ![%(i,N)+1] = 1]
  (* A philosopher can finish eating and put down forks *)
  \/ \A i \in 1..N : 
       /\ states[i] = "eating"
       /\ states' = [states EXCEPT ![i] = "thinking"]
       /\ forks' = [forks EXCEPT ![i] = 0, ![%(i,N)+1] = 0]
  (* No other changes *)
  \/ forks' = forks
  \/ states' = states

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<forks, states>>

name: Producer-Consumer Queue
generated_spec:
---- MODULE BoundedFIFOQueue ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANT K

VARIABLES q, head, tail, count, value

(* TypeOK ensures that q is a sequence of length K, head and tail are integers in 0..K-1, and count is an integer in 0..K *)
TypeOK == 
  /\ q \in Seq(K)
  /\ head \in 0..K-1
  /\ tail \in 0..K-1
  /\ count \in 0..K

(* The queue is represented as a sequence of length K, with head pointing to the next element to consume, tail pointing to the next slot to produce into, and count indicating the number of elements in the queue. *)
Init == 
  /\ q = <<>> \o <<K-1 \# 0>>  (* Pad the sequence to length K *)
  /\ head = 0
  /\ tail = 0
  /\ count = 0

(* The producer action: if the queue is not full, it writes a value into the tail slot and updates tail and count. *)
Producer == 
  /\ count < K
  /\ q' = Append(q, <<>>)[tail \in 0..K-1 |-> value]  (* Write value at tail *)
  /\ tail' = (tail + 1) \mod K
  /\ count' = count + 1
  /\ UNCHANGED <<head, q>>

(* The consumer action: if the queue is not empty, it reads the value at head and updates head and count. *)
Consumer == 
  /\ count > 0
  /\ value' = q[head]
  /\ head' = (head + 1) \mod K
  /\ count' = count - 1
  /\ UNCHANGED <<tail, q>>

(* Next action: either the producer or the consumer can act. *)
Next == 
  \/ Producer
  \/ Consumer

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<q, head, tail, count>>

name: Read-Write Lock
generated_spec:
---- MODULE ReadWriteLock ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES readers, writer_active, r

Init == /\ readers = <<>> \\
       /\ writer_active = FALSE

Next == \/ /\ writer_active = FALSE \\
          /\ \E r \in 1..10 : /\ r \notin readers \\
          /\ r' = r \\
             /\ writer_active' = FALSE \\
             /\ readers' = Append(readers, r) \\
          \/ /\ writer_active = TRUE \\
             /\ r' = r \\
                /\ writer_active' = FALSE \\
                /\ readers' = <<>> \\
          \/ /\ writer_active = FALSE \\
             /\ r' = r \\
                /\ writer_active' = TRUE \\
                /\ readers' = <<>> \\
          \/ /\ writer_active = FALSE \\
             /\ r' = r \\
                /\ writer_active' = FALSE \\
                /\ readers' = readers

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<readers, writer_active>>

name: Distributed Snapshot (Chandy-Lamport)
generated_spec:
---- MODULE ChandyLamportSnapshot ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES state, channel, markerSent, markerReceived, snapshotTaken, N, Channels, initialState, hasn
Init == /\ state = [i \in 1..N |-> initialState[i]]
        /\ channel = [c \in Channels |-> <<>>]
        /\ markerSent = [c \in Channels |-> FALSE]
        /\ markerReceived = [c \in Channels |-> FALSE]
        /\ snapshotTaken = [i \in 1..N |-> FALSE]

\* Next-state relation
Next == 
  \* Process i records its state and sends markers if it hasn't already
  \/ /\ \E i \in 1..N : /\ ~snapshotTaken[i]
        /\ snapshotTaken' = [snapshotTaken EXCEPT ![i] = TRUE]
        /\ \E j \in 1..N : /\ i # j
            /\ markerSent' = [markerSent EXCEPT !i..j = TRUE]
            /\ channel' = [channel EXCEPT !i..j = Append(channeli..j, "marker")]
        /\ UNCHANGED <<state, markerReceived>>
  \* Process i receives a marker on channel (j, i) if it hasn't yet
  \/ /\ \E i, j \in 1..N : /\ i # j
        /\ ~markerReceivedi..j
        /\ channeli..j = <<>> \/ /\ channeli..j[1] = "marker"
        /\ channel' = [channel EXCEPT !i..j = Tail(channeli..j)]
        /\ markerReceived' = [markerReceived EXCEPT !i..j = TRUE]
        /\ UNCHANGED <<state, snapshotTaken, markerSent>>
  \* Process i receives a non-marker message on channel (j, i) if it has already taken a snapshot
  \/ /\ \E i, j \in 1..N : /\ i # j
        /\ snapshotTaken[i]
        /\ ~markerReceivedi..j
        /\ channeli..j = <<>> \/ /\ channeli..j[1] = "msg"
        /\ channel' = [channel EXCEPT !i..j = Tail(channeli..j)]
        /\ UNCHANGED <<state, snapshotTaken, markerSent, markerReceived>>

\* Invariant: All markers are eventually received
TypeOK == /\ \A i, j \in 1..N : i # j
          /\ markerSenti..j => markerReceivedi..j
          /\ \A i \in 1..N : snapshotTaken[i] => \A j \in 1..N : i # j => markerReceivedi..j

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<state, channel, markerSent, markerReceived, snapshotTaken>>

====

---- MODULE TokenRing ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANT N

VARIABLE token

Init == /\ token \in 1..N

Next == /\ token' \in 1..N
        /\ token' = IF token = N THEN 1 ELSE token + 1

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<token>>

name: Simple Key-Value Store
generated_spec:
---- MODULE KeyValueStore ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS Keys, Values, NULL

VARIABLES store

Init == store = [k \in Keys |-> NULL]

Next == \/ /\ \E k \in Keys : \E v \in Values : /\ store' = [store EXCEPT ![k] = v]
      \/ /\ \E k \in Keys : /\ store' = [store EXCEPT ![k] = NULL]

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<store>>

TypeOK == /\ store \in [Keys -> Values]
          /\ \A k \in Keys : store[k] \in Values

name: Bounded Retransmission Protocol
generated_spec:
---- MODULE Sender ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES file, chunkSize, maxRetries, retransmitCount, sentChunks, receivedChunks, lostChunks

Init == /\ file \in Seq
       /\ chunkSize \in Nat
       /\ maxRetries \in Nat
       /\ retransmitCount \in Nat
       /\ sentChunks \in Seq
       /\ receivedChunks \in Seq
       /\ lostChunks \in Seq
       /\ retransmitCount = 0
       /\ sentChunks = <<>>
       /\ receivedChunks = <<>>
       /\ lostChunks = <<>>

Next == /\ sentChunks' = Append(sentChunks, file[retransmitCount + 1 .. retransmitCount + chunkSize])
       /\ lostChunks' = Append(lostChunks, [x \in Seq |-> x \in lostChunks \/ x \in sentChunks'])
       /\ receivedChunks' = Append(receivedChunks, [x \in Seq |-> x \in receivedChunks \/ x \in sentChunks' /\ x \notin lostChunks'])
       /\ retransmitCount' = IF retransmitCount < maxRetries THEN retransmitCount + 1 ELSE retransmitCount
       /\ UNCHANGED <<file, chunkSize, maxRetries>>

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<file, chunkSize, maxRetries, retransmitCount, sentChunks, receivedChunks, lostChunks>>

name: Peterson's Algorithm
generated_spec:
---- MODULE Peterson2 ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES flag, turn

Init == /\ flag = [i \in 1..2 |-> FALSE]
        /\ turn = 1

Next == \/ /\ flag[1] = FALSE
          /\ flag[2] = FALSE
          /\ turn' = turn
          /\ flag' = flag
        \/ /\ flag[1] = TRUE
          /\ turn' = 2
          /\ flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![2] = FALSE]
        \/ /\ flag[2] = TRUE
          /\ turn' = 1
          /\ flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![1] = FALSE]

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<flag, turn>>

name: Simple Allocator
generated_spec:
---- MODULE MemoryAllocator ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS N, Pages, Clients

VARIABLE free, allocated, c

Init == /\ free = Pages
        /\ allocated = [c \in Clients |-> {}]

Next == /\ \E p \in Pages :
          /\ p \in free
          /\ free' = free \ {p}
          /\ \E c \in Clients :
              /\ allocated' = [allocated EXCEPT ![c] = @ \cup {p}]
              /\ \E c' \in Clients \ {c} :
                  /\ allocated' = [allocated EXCEPT ![c'] = @]
          \/ \E c \in Clients :
              /\ \E p \in allocated[c] :
                  /\ free' = free \cup {p}
                  /\ allocated' = [allocated EXCEPT ![c] = @ \ {p}]
                  /\ \E c' \in Clients \ {c} :
                      /\ allocated' = [allocated EXCEPT ![c'] = @]
          \/ /\ free' = free
              /\ allocated' = allocated

TypeOK == /\ free \subseteq Pages
          /\ \A c \in Clients : allocated[c] \subseteq Pages
          /\ \A c \in Clients : IsFiniteSet(allocated[c])
          /\ \A c \in Clients : \A p \in allocated[c] : p \in Pages
          /\ \A c \in Clients : \A p \in allocated[c] : \A c' \in Clients \ {c} : p \notin allocated[c']

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<free, allocated>> /\ TypeOK

EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES turn, wants

Init == /\ turn \in {0,1}
        /\ wants \in {0,1}^2
        /\ wants = <<0,0>>

Next == \/ /\ turn' = 1

        \/ /\ turn' = 0
          /\ wants' = <<0,1>>
        \/ /\ turn' = turn
          /\ wants' = wants

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<turn,wants>>
